creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just tested it on a newly installed machine.

As you can see, it installs the deps you are mentioning:
root@gitlab:~ # pkg install gitlab-ce
Updating gitlab repository catalogue...
gitlab repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
